alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout remains imminent; 1-2 week window persists amid IAEA negotiations
alerts.summary: Iran's uranium enrichment at 60% U-235 continues to compress estimated breakout time to 1-2 weeks per global_metrics. UN nuclear chief signals inspectors will visit Iranian sites contingent on final deal completion. Multiple headline corroboration (NPR, South Carolina Public Radio, Foundation for Defense of Democracies) underscores diplomatic urgency as regime prepares potential contingencies amid escalating maritime tensions.

alerts.title: Iran escalates Strait of Hormuz challenge; continued attacks test Trump agreement
alerts.summary: IRGC Navy attack on cargo vessel near Oman (26.37°N, 56.2°E) persists as unresolved escalation testing Trump's Hormuz deal. Multi-source corroboration (WSJ, Washington Post, CNN, NBC, NPR, Time, BBC, NYT, CBS, Al Jazeera) confirms Iranian attribution. Vessel reportedly ignored Persian Gulf Strait Authority coordination and verbal warnings prior to strike per Middle East Spectator (~52K views). UN evacuation operations remain paused through strategic waterway.

alerts.title: US multi-carrier deployment surge continues amid Persian Gulf nuclear escalation
alerts.summary: USS Abraham Lincoln (Arabian Sea), USS Gerald R. Ford (Mediterranean), USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (Red Sea), USS Bataan, and destroyers Carney, Mason, Laboon maintain concentrated presence across critical zones. Assets positioned to respond to 1-2 week nuclear breakout window and Iranian maritime aggression. Threat level remains CRITICAL (9/10) per global_metrics.
alerts.region: Persian Gulf / Red Sea / Arabian Sea / Mediterranean

alerts.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon amid ceasefire amid Trump pressure on Netanyahu
alerts.summary: Israeli warplanes struck Lebanon targets (33.71°N, 35.87°E region) killing at least two civilians per Hezbollah statement and Middle East Eye, violating ceasefire terms. Trump explicitly told Netanyahu not to strike back at Iran (Axios), attempting to constrain Israeli escalation. Clashes reported in Beit Yahoun with Hebrew media confirming Israeli casualties per ME Spectator (~44K views). Pattern suggests fragility of April ceasefire.

alerts.title: US domestic sentiment stabilizes as Iran conflict discourse remains elevated
alerts.summary: US sentiment 56% positive / 39% negative with 'trump' (49 mentions), 'iran' (13), 'court', 'supreme' dominating discourse, signaling Trump administration focus on Iran policy and domestic legal battles. No dramatic negative spike from baseline, but 'war' and 'fear' remain in top keywords. Absence of dramatic sentiment collapse suggests public fatigue rather than new crisis catalyst.

analysis_note: Iran maintains imminent 1-2 week nuclear breakout capability while testing Trump's Strait of Hormuz agreement through persistent IRGC maritime strikes; multi-carrier US deployment, Israeli-Hezbollah clashes despite ceasefire, and compressed diplomatic timeline create multiple escalation vectors in parallel.
